overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's urban downtown. The player moves from an elevated pedestrian plaza with teal barriers down to a street-level sidewalk, passing neon signs, billboards, and pedestrians in a futuristic cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with teal barriers

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated plaza past benches and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket talking on phone while leaning against teal barrier

entered.detail: low teal-colored concrete barriers lining the plaza walkway
green neon 'OPEN' sign on building facade
tall building with many illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an elevated pedestrian plaza surrounded by futuristic high-rises. The player walks past teal barriers and concrete benches where NPCs are seated. Neon signs including a green 'OPEN' sign and 'CHILLAX' storefront illuminate the scene as the player moves forward through the sparse crowd.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall building facades and ventilation structures

agents.ego_description: walking forward then looking up at the towering buildings and architectural details

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in black clothing

entered.detail: large circular industrial ventilation fan on building facade
exposed red structural support beams on building exterior
elevated pedestrian walkway or monorail track overhead

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the plaza corridor between towering buildings with red structural beams. The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive ventilation fan and overhead walkways against the night sky. The teal barriers fall behind as the player approaches the center of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from plaza to street level via stairs

events.description: descends from elevated plaza to street level via stairs alongside the road

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs from the elevated plaza to the street sidewalk

notable_agents.action: red car driving on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large blue billboard with red star and 'CIRKUS GOLD' text
concrete sidewalk at street level with metal railings and orange bollards

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the elevated plaza to street level via stairs alongside a busy road. A large 'CIRKUS GOLD' billboard becomes prominent on the right. Vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left as the player reaches the street-level sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street sidewalk with food vendors

events.description: passing by an illuminated food cart with neon lighting on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk past pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at illuminated food cart with umbrella

entered.detail: food cart with bright orange neon lighting and umbrella
yellow and black vending machine on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the street-level sidewalk under building overhangs. The 'CIRKUS GOLD' billboard remains visible but moves further back. The player passes a vending machine and approaches a brightly lit food cart with neon orange lighting where a vendor stands. Vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated pedestrian plaza down into the neon-lit bustle of a street-level urban corridor. It begins by moving past teal barriers and concrete benches in a high-rise plaza, passing glowing signs for a Chillax storefront and an open shop. As the camera pushes deeper into the corridor, the view tilts upward to reveal massive ventilation fans and overhead walkways framed by red structural beams. The scene then shifts as the player descends a set of stairs, leaving the plaza behind to reach a busy multi-lane road dominated by a large Cirkus Gold billboard. Finally, the movement continues along the street-level sidewalk under building overhangs, passing a vending machine before arriving at a brightly lit food cart glowing with neon orange light.
